title: デビュー戦の後に・意外な弱点

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross crosses the finish line of her debut
without issue. After the race, however...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Urgh... The heck? My legs're shakin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, junior-level races shouldn't take this much
outta me... Why do I feel so... woozy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her to rest a little before we reflect on
today's events and formulate plans for the future.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not that big of a deal. Just a li'l tired, that's
all.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure it wasn't because you didn't eat
enough?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess that could be the case...
choice_data_list:
Why would you starve yourself before a big
race?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well... I didn't think this was worth bringin' up,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't have that much of an appetite. Been that
way since I was a kid...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, squirts! You two're still starvin', right? Here,
have my share.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: But... aren't you hungry too?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm stuffed. The next door neighbor got me
some beef udon earlier.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So eat up, will ya? If ya don't, ya won't grow up
big 'n strong.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I always made sure the li'l squirts ate first, so my
stomach ended up shrinkin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Guess I just got used to it. Now I even feel like I
focus better on a light stomach.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not sure it's somethin' I can change
overnight. Trust me, too much food spells trouble
for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...From the sounds of it, she's probably tried to
increase her food intake in the past to no avail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if we don't work on these ingrained eating
habits, there's no way we'll be able to build her
up to be more athletic.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry 'bout it. I might not be a foodie, but
my guts are straight outta Naniwa!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And the next place I wanna take these guts is a
G1! How 'bout we try the Hopeful Stakes or
somethin'? I gotta hurry up 'n show the folks back
home how far I've come!
choice_data_list:
That's a fine aspiration, but I'm not sure we
should make it our goal...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why da heck not?! I know I can pull it off! Geez,
talk about a party pooper!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, now's the time to make a push. Don't
overthink it. Just go with the flow!
choice_data_list:
Why don't we plan for the future and prioritize
building up your body?

Why don't we plan for the future and prioritize
building up your body?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna do all that slow 'n steady crap! I'm
good to go!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how bulky the other runners are,
I'll send 'em flyin' 'n make my family proud! I'm
not the same racer I was before my debut!
choice_data_list:
In that case, how about we try a little test
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A test, huh? Count me in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buonooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aarrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross makes her grand sumo wrestling
debut, but it's not long before she's knocked out
of the ring by the towering yokozuna, Hishi
Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's all it took to send me flying?!
choice_data_list:
Now do you see why building muscle is
important?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Tch, so the big leagues are full of jumbo runners
like her? If that's the case, hoo boy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right. I get it. We can stick to the low-level
races for now while I bulk up. But how long's that
gonna take?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's a good question. Even if we start bulking
up right away, we won't see results overnight.
We'll need to set a tentative end date...
choice_data_list:
We'll stick with this until next spring. That'll
bring us right up to the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's ages away! C'mon, let's just go straight to
the G1!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buoooono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Fiiine! Next spring it is. That gives me till then to
chow down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to build up our racing
experience slowly but surely between now and
next spring.
